commonParams.background: warm cream or terracotta surfaces, natural light
commonParams.lighting: bright natural window light, warm and inviting
commonParams.avoid: no dark backgrounds, no sterile environments, no sad animals

hero-dog.prompt: Professional pet photography of a happy golden retriever sitting in a bright warm pet store interior, aisles of colorful pet products in background, natural window light, joyful and welcoming, commercial quality

treats-display.prompt: Professional product photography of glass apothecary jars filled with colorful natural dog treats on a warm wooden shelf, terracotta wall background, bright natural light, premium pet store aesthetic

grooming-station.prompt: Professional interior photography of a bright clean dog grooming station, stainless steel tub, grooming tools organized on a shelf, fluffy towels, warm natural light through a window, welcoming and professional, no people or animals

cat-toys.prompt: Professional product photography of colorful cat toys arranged beautifully on a warm cream surface, feather wands, crinkle balls, catnip mice, bright natural light, playful and premium

pet-beds.prompt: Professional product photography of two cozy plush pet beds in different sizes on a warm wooden floor, sage green wall behind, natural window light, inviting and premium, home aesthetic

adoption-event.prompt: Professional photography of a bright community adoption event setup, colorful banners, pet crates with soft blankets, toys and treats displayed, warm natural light, welcoming atmosphere, no people or animals prominently

store-interior.prompt: Professional interior photography of a warm charming independent pet store, wooden shelving filled with premium pet products, terracotta and sage color palette, large front window with natural light, cozy and inviting, no people or animals

staff-area.prompt: Professional photography of a warm pet store counter area, a jar of dog treats on the counter, a vintage scale, product samples displayed, sage green wall, natural light, welcoming small business feel, no people
